title: System Health — DB & Pipeline
description: Row counts, pipeline throughput, events, UNS metrics, downtimes — filtered by hierarchy

list.name: enterprise
list.label: Enterprise
list.query: SELECT nm_enterprise AS __text, id_enterprise AS __value FROM enterprises ORDER BY nm_enterprise

list.name: site
list.label: Site
list.query: SELECT nm_site AS __text, id_site AS __value FROM sites WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) ORDER BY nm_site

list.name: area
list.label: Area
list.query: SELECT nm_area AS __text, id_area AS __value FROM areas WHERE id_site IN ($site) ORDER BY nm_area

list.name: equipment
list.label: Equipment
list.query: SELECT nm_equipment AS __text, id_equipment AS __value FROM equipments WHERE id_area IN ($area) ORDER BY nm_equipment

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_values WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)) AS "equipment_values", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_events WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)) AS "equipment_events", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uns_metrics WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)) AS "uns_metrics", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production_orders WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)) AS "production_orders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packml_register WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)) AS "packml_register"

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts_value, '1m'), COUNT(*) AS "Rows/min" FROM equipment_values WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_value) AND id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Rows/hr" FROM equipment_values WHERE ts_value > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)

SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT id_equipment) AS "Reporting" FROM equipment_values WHERE ts_value > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)
SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Events" FROM equipment_events WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)
SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "UNS Metrics" FROM uns_metrics WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment)

panels.title: Metric Type Breakdown Over Time
panels.description: Which PackML parameters are flowing through the pipeline

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts_value, '1m'), SUM(CASE WHEN net_production_incr IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "ProdProcessed", SUM(CASE WHEN scrap_incr IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "ProdDefective", SUM(CASE WHEN state IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "StateCurrent", SUM(CASE WHEN mode IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "UnitMode", SUM(CASE WHEN speed IS NOT NULL AND net_production_incr IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "MachSpeed" FROM equipment_values WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_value) AND id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND id_site IN ($site) AND id_area IN ($area) AND id_equipment IN ($equipment) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ee.ts_event, ent.nm_enterprise, e.nm_equipment, ee.status, ee.txt_downtime_notes, ee.ts_end, ee.duration, CASE WHEN ee.planned_downtime THEN 'Planned' WHEN ee.change_over THEN 'Changeover' WHEN ee.status = 6 THEN 'Running' ELSE 'Unplanned' END AS type FROM equipment_events ee LEFT JOIN equipments e ON e.id_equipment = ee.id_equipment LEFT JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = ee.id_enterprise WHERE ee.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND ee.id_equipment IN ($equipment) ORDER BY ee.ts_event DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT um.ts_value, ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, e.nm_equipment, um.metric_name, um.metric_value, um.metric_type FROM uns_metrics um LEFT JOIN equipments e ON e.id_equipment = um.id_equipment LEFT JOIN areas a ON a.id_area = um.id_area LEFT JOIN sites s ON s.id_site = um.id_site LEFT JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = um.id_enterprise WHERE um.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND um.id_site IN ($site) AND um.id_area IN ($area) AND um.id_equipment IN ($equipment) ORDER BY um.ts_value DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT ee.id_equipment_event, ent.nm_enterprise, e.nm_equipment, ee.ts_event AS ts_start, ee.ts_end, ROUND(COALESCE(ee.duration, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ee.ts_event))::integer) / 60.0, 1) AS duration_min, ee.txt_downtime_notes, CASE WHEN ee.planned_downtime THEN 'Planned' WHEN ee.change_over THEN 'Changeover' ELSE 'Unplanned' END AS type FROM equipment_events ee LEFT JOIN equipments e ON e.id_equipment = ee.id_equipment LEFT JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = ee.id_enterprise WHERE ee.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND ee.id_equipment IN ($equipment) AND ee.status != 6 ORDER BY ee.ts_event DESC LIMIT 30
